expectations.text: Acknowledges the mechanism is plausible in principle
expectations.evidence: Discusses the mechanism and states pump 'does temporarily increase muscle volume.'

expectations.text: Explains that fatigue from pump work typically masks or outweighs any leverage benefit
expectations.evidence: States: 'The metabolic state that creates a pump...is the same state that impairs strength performance.'

expectations.text: Notes the effect would vary by muscle architecture and joint angle
expectations.evidence: Does not discuss architecture or joint angle variation.

expectations.text: Concludes don't count on pumps as a reliable strategy for immediate strength expression
expectations.evidence: Concludes pump 'cannot acutely replicate the strength benefits of actual muscle growth.'
